SQLLite.SQL: SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*), 0, 'N','Y') AS "WelshTranslation" FROM parties p, ae_applications aa WHERE aa.ae_number = ${param.aeNumber} AND p.party_id = NVL(aa.debtors_employers_party_id,0) AND NVL(welsh_indicator,'N') = 'Y'

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
